name: Narrative Overlay — Sales

data.dsp_query: SELECT date_trunc('day', order_date) AS d, SUM(amount) AS rev FROM public.sales WHERE order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

semantic.cypher: MATCH (g:Glossary)-[:DESCRIBES]->(o:DspObject {id: $obj}) RETURN g.term AS term, g.definition_source AS definition_source
